name: SIBUR International GmbH
description: SIBUR is a leading petrochemical company that produces synthetic rubbers, highlighting its expertise in this area. With a strong export presence, SIBUR ensures the delivery of its products, including synthetic rubbers, to markets in Europe and Asia.

name: ARLANXEO
description: ARLANXEO is one of the world's largest producers of synthetic rubber, developing and marketing high-performance rubbers for diverse applications, including automotive, electrical, construction, and oil and gas industries. Their commitment to innovation and sustainability ensures they are well-positioned to meet future demands in the synthetic rubber market.

name: Elkem
description: The company, a leader in liquid silicone rubber manufacturing, offers a range of silicone elastomers and innovative rubber solutions, highlighting their expertise in the field. Their products include BLUESIL™ Heat Cure Rubber and Liquid Silicone Rubber, which may be relevant for applications in synthetic rubber development.

name: Dynasol Group
description: Dynasol Group is a leading manufacturer in the synthetic rubber market, providing innovative solutions such as Emulsion SBR and Emulsion NBR, and highlighting its commitment to technology and environmental sustainability.

name: Rubbercraft part of Integrated Polymer Solutions
description: Rubbercraft specializes in precision-engineered, custom elastomeric parts, which may include synthetic rubber solutions. With a focus on innovative and sustainable polymer solutions, the company addresses complex challenges across various market sectors.

name: Bhavik Enterprise
description: Bhavik Enterprise is a key player in the synthetic rubber market, offering a wide range of products including Synthetic Rubber, EPDM Rubber, NBR, and Chloroprene Rubber. With over 28 years of experience, the company provides technical support and a robust supply chain for the rubber and plastic industries across India.

name: Rubberlite, Inc.
description: Rubberlite specializes in producing a variety of synthetic rubber products, including neoprene, EPDM, and nitrile. Their commitment to quality and innovation is evident in their expanded product line and custom-engineered solutions.

name: PT Kirana Megatara Tbk
description: Kirana Megatara Group is a leading manufacturer of crumb rubber in Indonesia, specializing in technically specified rubber (TSR), which serves as a crucial raw material for tire production. The company's commitment to high quality and sustainable practices positions it as a key player in the synthetic rubber market.

name: INOAC
description: The company specializes in the development of synthetic rubber products, offering a diverse range of applications across various industries, including automotive and consumer lifestyle products. With a focus on innovative materials, it positions itself as a key player in the synthetic rubber market.

name: Chemical Rubber Company
description: The company is a leading manufacturer of synthetic rubber products, offering a variety of types including SBR, Neoprene, Nitrile, EPDM, Hypalon, and Silicone. Their expertise in custom orders ensures high-quality products designed for durability and resistance to wear and environmental conditions.
